_comment: Bootstrap placeholder. perSitemap is intentionally empty — the audit-bfs-depth.mjs gate will pass for every sitemap because the loop only flags sitemaps already present in the baseline (`if (!prev) continue`). This lets the gate ship enabled. After the first full production deploy lands, regenerate the baseline against a clean dist/ via `npm run audit:max-bfs-depth:rebaseline` and commit the populated JSON. From that point onward the ratchet is live: any sitemap whose atDepthGtMax goes UP fails the gate. Numbers must only DECREASE — per CLAUDE.md non-negotiable rule #5, orphans are fixed via internal links, never noindex.
